records.question: Who are the students with first name Lizeth, last name Bartoletti, login name mkou, email celestine11@example.net, password 76a93d1d3b7becc932d203beac61d064bd54e947, cell number 812.228.0645x91481, and details exactly Joe?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN students ON people.person_id = students.student_id
WHERE people.password = '76a93d1d3b7becc932d203beac61d064bd54e947' AND people.email_address = 'celestine11@example.net' AND people.first_name = 'Lizeth' AND people.last_name = 'Bartoletti' AND people.login_name = 'mkou' AND students.student_details = 'Joe' AND people.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT People.person_id
FROM People
JOIN Students ON People.person_id = Students.student_id
WHERE People.first_name = 'Lizeth'
  AND People.last_name = 'Bartoletti'
  AND People.login_name = 'mkou'
  AND People.email_address = 'celestine11@example.net'
  AND People.password = '76a93d1d3b7becc932d203beac61d064bd54e947'
  AND People.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481'
  AND Students.student_details = 'Joe'

records.question: Which people have the login name zops and are linked to both addresses and candidate profiles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.login_name = 'zops'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT People.person_id
FROM People
JOIN People_Addresses ON People.person_id = People_Addresses.person_id
JOIN Candidates ON People.person_id = Candidates.candidate_id
WHERE People.login_name = 'zops'

records.question: Who has login name uuol, middle name Arielle, email adele.gibson@example.net, password 7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec, cell number 1-372-548-7538x314, candidate details Tao, and addresses with date from at least 2014-05-10 00:32:31 and date to at least 2018-03-08 06:16:47?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.password = '7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec' AND people.cell_mobile_number = '1-372-548-7538x314' AND people_addresses.date_from >= '2014-05-10 00:32:31' AND people.middle_name = 'Arielle' AND candidates.candidate_details = 'Tao' AND people.email_address = 'adele.gibson@example.net' AND people_addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-08 06:16:47' AND people.login_name = 'uuol'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT People.person_id
FROM People
JOIN Candidates ON Candidates.candidate_id = People.person_id
JOIN People_Addresses ON People_Addresses.person_id = People.person_id
WHERE People.login_name = 'uuol'
  AND People.middle_name = 'Arielle'
  AND People.email_address = 'adele.gibson@example.net'
  AND People.password = '7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec'
  AND People.cell_mobile_number = '1-372-548-7538x314'
  AND Candidates.candidate_details = 'Tao'
  AND People_Addresses.date_from >= '2014-05-10 00:32:31'
  AND People_Addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-08 06:16:47'

records.question: Who has the last name Bartoletti, login name mkou, cell mobile number 812.228.0645x91481, and had an address that was valid on or before 2015-05-24 16:14:12 and ended exactly on 2018-02-23 22:44:18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.last_name = 'Bartoletti' AND people.login_name = 'mkou' AND people_addresses.date_to = '2018-02-23 22:44:18' AND people.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481' AND people_addresses.date_from <= '2015-05-24 16:14:12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT People.person_id
FROM People
JOIN People_Addresses ON People.person_id = People_Addresses.person_id
WHERE People.last_name = 'Bartoletti'
  AND People.login_name = 'mkou'
  AND People.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481'
  AND People_Addresses.date_from <= '2015-05-24 16:14:12'
  AND People_Addresses.date_to = '2018-02-23 22:44:18'
